_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: LeafMC
author: migueklegal@gmail.com
description: Leaf is a high-performance fork of PaperMC designed for extreme optimization, featuring Gale/Pufferfish tweaks, asynchronous pathfinding, Lithium-based physics optimizations, and ZGC support.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# LeafMC Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
PROJECT=leaf
USER_AGENT="Pterodactyl (https://pterodactyl.io)"

if [ -n "${DL_PATH}" ]; then
	echo -e "Using supplied download url: ${DL_PATH}"
	DOWNLOAD_URL=`eval echo $(echo ${DL_PATH} | sed -e 's/{{/${/g' -e 's/}}/}/g')`
else
	VER_EXISTS=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT} | jq -r --arg VERSION "$MINECRAFT_VERSION" '.versions | any(.[]; index($VERSION))' | grep -m1 true`
	LATEST_VERSION=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT} | jq -r '.versions[-1]'`

	if [ "${VER_EXISTS}" == "true" ]; then
		echo -e "Version is valid. Using version ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
	else
		echo -e "Specified version not found. Defaulting to the latest ${PROJECT} version"
		MINECRAFT_VERSION=${LATEST_VERSION}
	fi

	BUILD_EXISTS=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT}/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION} | jq -r --arg BUILD ${BUILD_NUMBER} '.builds[] | tostring | contains($BUILD)' | grep -m1 true`
	LATEST_BUILD=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT}/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION} | jq -r '.builds[-1]'`

	if [ "${BUILD_EXISTS}" == "true" ]; then
		echo -e "Build is valid for version ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}. Using build ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
	else
		echo -e "Using the latest ${PROJECT} build for version ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
		BUILD_NUMBER=${LATEST_BUILD}
	fi

	echo "Version being downloaded"
	echo -e "Project: ${PROJECT}"
	echo -e "MC Version: ${MINECRAFT_VERSION}"
	echo -e "Build: ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
	
	JAR_NAME=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT}/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_NUMBER} | jq -r '.downloads.primary.name'`
	DOWNLOAD_URL="https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT}/versions/${MINECRAFT_VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_NUMBER}/downloads/${JAR_NAME}"
fi

cd /mnt/server

echo -e "Running curl --user-agent \"${USER_AGENT}\" -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [ -f ${SERVER_JARFILE} ]; then
	mv ${SERVER_JARFILE} ${SERVER_JARFILE}.old
fi

curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} ${DOWNLOAD_URL}

if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
    echo -e "Downloading MC server.properties"
    curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -o server.properties https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pterodactyl/game-eggs/main/minecraft/java/server.properties
fi

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description:
The version of Minecraft to download.

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The name of the server jarfile to run the server with.

variables.name: Download Path
variables.description: A URL to use to download a server.jar rather than the ones in the install script. This is not user viewable.

variables.name: Build Number
variables.description:
The build number for the LeafMC release.

Leave at latest to always get the latest version. Invalid versions will default to latest.

variables.name: JVM Optimizations
variables.description:
JVM startup flags for optimized Garbage Collection and memory management.

- Aikar's G1GC (Default) - Best general performance for Java 17/21 G1.
- Generational ZGC (Java 21+ Recommended):
  -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseZGC -XX:+ZGenerational -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+UseNUMA -XX:+AlwaysActAsServerClassMachine -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+UseDynamicNumberOfGCThreads
- Generational Shenandoah GC:
  -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:+UseShenandoahGC -XX:ShenandoahGCMode=generational -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+UseNUMA -XX:+AlwaysActAsServerClassMachine -XX:+ParallelRefProcEnabled -XX:+PerfDisableSharedMem -XX:+UseDynamicNumberOfGCThreads
